name: concourse
description: Local-first learning suite with portable course packs, retrieval practice, and a Tauri desktop shell.
author: Conal Hickey

scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-contracts run typecheck && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-sdk run typecheck
scripts.test:packages: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-contracts run test && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-sdk run test
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-contracts run build && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-sdk run build
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && vitest run src content && npm run test:website
scripts.format:packages: npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-contracts exec -- prettier --write src test scripts/generate-logic-foundations-fixture.mjs vitest.config.ts && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-sdk exec -- prettier --write src test vitest.config.ts
scripts.format:check:packages: npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-contracts exec -- prettier --check src test scripts/generate-logic-foundations-fixture.mjs vitest.config.ts && npm --workspace=@learnt/learning-pack-sdk exec -- prettier --check src test vitest.config.ts
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
